name: Claude Code Executor
description: Delegate tasks to a local Claude Code agent. Fire-and-forget: sends a prompt, returns the result. The agent works on the local filesystem with full tool access.

tools.name: executor-claude.run
tools.description: Run a Claude Code agent on the host machine. Give it a task prompt, it works autonomously and returns the result. Use for heavy compute, local tools, or tasks that need real filesystem access.
